title: Stakeholders, Ethics, Accessibility, and Harm Analysis · Product Reasoning Brief: Ethics Principle Case
summary: Primary-user convenience may shift surveillance, labor, exclusion, safety, environmental, or procedural costs onto less visible people. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone ethics principle case increment in stakeholder benefit-burden and harm register. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply public good, harm avoidance, honesty, fairness, privacy, competence, review, and accountability to concrete project conflicts.
Map benefit, burden, exposure, voice, authority, recourse, and accountability across users and affected non-users.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

steps.title: Predict Ethics Principle Case · Theory Ethics Principle Case
steps.instruction:
theory case — Primary-user convenience shifts surveillance, exclusion, labor, safety, environmental, and appeal costs onto people with less product power. The theory variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Ethics Principle Case contract for the supplied data.

content.text: Apply public good, harm avoidance, honesty, fairness, privacy, competence, review, and accountability to concrete project conflicts. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Ethics Principle Case while producing stakeholder benefit-burden and harm register.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Primary-user convenience shifts surveillance, exclusion, labor, safety, environmental, and appeal costs onto people with less product power. The worked example variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Apply public good, harm avoidance, honesty, fairness, privacy, competence, review, and accountability to concrete project conflicts. A defensible solution applies Ethics Principle Case, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to stakeholder benefit-burden and harm register.

claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context

owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer

steps.title: Defend the Ethics Principle Case model · Theory Ethics Principle Case

The theory variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. content.title: Evidence defense
